description: Mardi Gras celebration email template with editable sections and eye-catching CTAs. Add your offer or discount and more!

designer.description: UX/UI Designer with great creativity and artistic talent delivering high-impact design experiences, marketing solutions and digital projects. Exceptional collaborative and interpersonal skills; solid team player with well-developed written and verbal communication abilities. Highly skilled in deadline and project management, and working within budget requirements. Experience working for international companies (USA, Latin America, Europe). Looking for the best collaboration opportunities to materialize your ideas and help you grow your business!

html_data:
Join us for the fun!

MARDI GRAS

Experience the taste of New Orleans at our Mardi Gras party!

 

Mon, Feb 28 - Sat, Mar 5

5:00 pm - 1:30 am

All you can eat shrimp & 2x1 in local beers!

Reserve Table Now
 

The event you don’t 
want to miss!

Join us for Cajun and Creole food, specialty drinks, 
giveaways, live jazz music, and more!

$20/person

 

Special Prizes!

We’ll be giving away a variety of fantastic prizes, and one 
lucky winner will receive a grand prize of $600.

Reserve Table Now
 
 

Drinks Menu

Join us for Cajun and Creole food, specialty drinks, 
giveaways, live jazz music, and more!

Hurricane
Abracadabra
River Delta

Crescent City
